practice.name: Problem 23.5.1 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: In the adjoining figure, ABCD is a square, ABE is an equilateral triangle and point E is outside square ABCD . What is the measure of ∡AED in degrees? A BC D E

practice.name: Problem 23.5.4 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: In the figure, point A is the center of the circle, the measure of angle RAS is 74°, and the measure of angle RTB is 28°. What is the measure of minor arc BR, in degrees?

practice.name: Problem 23.5.9 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: In triangle ABC, AB = AC and ∠A = 40°. The bisector from ∠B intersects AC at point D. What is ∠BDC ?
